message:
feat(robot): add workflow_aborted and workflow_error codes with schema updates

Add robot.workflow_aborted and robot.workflow_error to the error code
catalog with Workflow category mapping. Update STANDARD_ROBOT_ERROR_CODES
const table, error_code_description() match arms, JSON schema enum,
PLAN.md MCP error table, proptest strategy generators, schema golden
test, and typed client integration test fixtures.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -4414,7 +4414,7 @@ All MCP errors use stable codes prefixed with `WA-MCP-`:
 | `WA-MCP-0005` | Storage error | `robot.storage_error` |
 | `WA-MCP-0006` | Policy denied | `robot.policy_denied` |
 | `WA-MCP-0007` | Pane not found | `robot.pane_not_found` |
-| `WA-MCP-0008` | Workflow error | Workflow-related robot errors, for example `robot.workflow_not_found`, `robot.mission_error`, `robot.tx_error` |
+| `WA-MCP-0008` | Workflow error | Workflow-related robot errors, for example `robot.workflow_error`, `robot.workflow_aborted`, `robot.workflow_not_found`, `robot.mission_error`, `robot.tx_error` |
 | `WA-MCP-0009` | Timeout | `robot.timeout` |
 | `WA-MCP-0010` | Not implemented | Unsupported/unavailable robot errors, for example `robot.unsupported`, `robot.feature_not_available` |

@@ -526,6 +526,8 @@ const STANDARD_ROBOT_ERROR_CODES: &[&str] = &[
     "robot.reservation_conflict",
     "robot.event_not_found",
     "robot.rule_not_found",
+    "robot.workflow_aborted",
+    "robot.workflow_error",
     "robot.workflow_not_found",
     "robot.code_not_found",
     "robot.invalid_service",
@@ -594,6 +596,10 @@ fn error_code_description(code: &str) -> &'static str {
         "robot.reservation_conflict" => "Pane is already reserved by another owner",
         "robot.event_not_found" => "Requested event ID does not exist",
         "robot.rule_not_found" => "Requested rule ID does not exist",
+        "robot.workflow_aborted" => {
+            "Workflow execution stopped before completion without a policy denial"
+        }
+        "robot.workflow_error" => "Workflow execution failed with an unrecoverable runtime error",
         "robot.workflow_not_found" => "Requested workflow name is not registered or available",
         "robot.code_not_found" => "Requested explanation code has no matching template entry",
         "robot.invalid_service" => "Requested external service identifier is not supported",
